name: Jam-Filled Chocolate Cake ~
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Mashed Potatoes at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
------------------------------------CAKE------------------------------------
1 teaspoon Vanilla
1 1/2 cups Cake Flour
2 teaspoons Baking Powder
1 teaspoon Cinnamon
1/4 teaspoon Nutmeg
1/8 teaspoon Ground Cloves
1/2 cup Apricot Preserves
-OR-
Orange Marmalade
--------------------------CINNAMON MOCHA FROSTING--------------------------
6 tablespoons Butter or Margarine, softened
3 cups Confectioners' Sugar
1/4 cup Strong Coffee, cooled
2 ounces Unsweetened Chocolate
1 teaspoon Cinnamon
1 teaspoon Vanilla
----------------------------------GARNISH----------------------------------
Blanched Almonds
Melt the unsweetened chocolate and allow to cool. Melt the preserves or orange marmalade. Preheat oven to 325 degrees Fahrenheit. Generously grease and flour an 8-inch springform pan; set aside. In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar until fluffy. Beat in egg yolks; mix well. Mix in potatoes, almonds, chocolate, milk, and vanilla. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and cloves. Add to chocolate mixture; mix well. In a separate medium bowl, beat egg whites until stiff but not dry. Fold into batter. Pour into prepared pan and smooth batter with a spatula. Place on a rack in the center of the oven; bake for about 1 hour and 15 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Remove from oven and place on a rack; let cool for 10 minutes. Remove sides of pan and let cool to room temperature. Using a serrated knife, cut into 2 layers. Spread each layer with preserves and cover with second layer. Spread sides and top with Cinnamon Mocha Frosting. Garnish with blanched almonds.
Cinnamon Mocha Frosting: In a small bowl, cream butter and sugar. Beat in coffee, melted chocolate (which has been cooled), cinnamon, and vanilla. Refrigerate until firm enough to spread easily, about 15 minutes.
